title: Update Parameter Golf leaderboard with BOS fix
author: cocohearts
body: README-only corrected leaderboard update. This revision now directly credits #1729/#1736 CaseOps, #1787, #1797, and #1851/#1868 while preserving score order. CaseOps is treated as valid because it is bijective and uses byte sidecars for original UTF-8 BPB; #1729 shows it was a net win and #1736/#1787 build on it. Adds p<0.25 accepted chain #1518/#1530/#1610/#1626/#1667/#1784 plus BOS-fixed #1851 using #1868 3-seed support. Supersedes #1899, which missed #1851/#1868 because the earlier audit cutoff ended before those live PRs. Excludes PPM-D/byte-mixture PRs pending C2 ruling; excludes #1855 as separate row because p=0.325 vs #1851/#1868.
